title: Man from the Restaurant
writer: Ivan Shmelyov, Yakov Protazanov, Oleg Leonidov
actors: Michael Chekhov, Mikhail Klimov, Mikhail Narokov
plot: An elderly man works as a waiter at a luxurious restaurant. He's content and full of hope, and treasures his family more than anything. But it's time of the First World War and news from the front change his life.
